parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "pipeline": "offer",
  "entity_id": "{{ $json.offer_trigger_id }}",
  "entity_type": "offer",
  "event_type": "agent_processed",
  "payload": {
    "customer_id": "{{ $json.customer_id }}",
    "action": "{{ $json.action }}",
    "product": "{{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.recommended_product }}",
    "cross_sell_score": {{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.cross_sell_score }},
    "final_route": "{{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.final_route }}",
    "orchestrator_override": {{ $('Apply Orchestrator Logic').first().json.orchestrator_override }},
    "logged_at": "{{ $now }}"
  }
}

headers.user-agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT; Windows NT 10.0; de-CH) WindowsPowerShell/5.1.26100.8115
